title: xo sessions-augment — watcher-owned per-session enrichments
description: Sibling file to `sessionslist.json`. Holds the fields the runtime adapters do not compute: message/tool/task counters, first/last activity timestamps, ended_at, and episode_refs. Single writer: the watcher (services/cowork_agent/visualizer/sinks/sessions_augment.py). BFF readers stitch rows here onto the corresponding `sessionslist.json` row at read time (see docs/watcher-design.md §3.7). Keys are the same composite session ids used by `sessionslist.json` so the merge is a simple dict overlay. Schema 2 (Phase 2 / Stage 3) adds the optional `messageCountByRole` field; schema 1 files stay valid because the field is optional and BFF helpers treat absence as zeros.

sessions.description: Map of composite session id (same key as sessionslist.json) → augmenting fields.

messageCount.description: Count of user+assistant message events observed in the runtime's session log.

messageCountByRole.description: Per-role breakdown of message events. Sum of user+assistant should equal messageCount; toolResults and errors are reserved for future event types (currently always 0). Introduced in schema 2.

toolCallCount.description: Count of tool_use events (all tools combined).

firstActivity.description: Epoch ms of the first event the watcher observed for this session.

lastActivity.description: Epoch ms of the most recent event.

ended_at.description: Set when the watcher detects the session has closed (PID gone, no events for 10+ minutes). Null while live.

episode_refs.description: Filenames (basename only) under <project>/memory/episodic/ that the watcher has paired with this session. Append-only; preserved verbatim across merges.
